raw_title: Book Review: ‘Dangerous, Dirty, Violent, and Young,’ by Zayd Ayers Dohrn
book_title: ‘Dangerous, Dirty, Violent, and Young,’ by Zayd Ayers Dohrn
description: Zayd Ayers Dohrn’s parents were leaders of the Weather Underground. His new book traces how their revolutionary ideals collided with their family life.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Talking Classics,’ by Mary Beard
description: For her latest book, the popular British scholar Mary Beard gets personal about how she fell for ancient Greece and Rome.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘An Inconvenient Widow,’ by Lois Romano
description: In “An Inconvenient Widow,” Lois Romano defends the most reviled first lady from her detractors past and present.
